local DATUM = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.DATUM
local TIME = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.TIME
local function safe_sub(str, start, finish)
 local s = string.sub(str, start, math.min(finish, #str))
 return s ~= "" and s or "00"
end
year = safe_sub(DATUM, 1, 4)
month = safe_sub(DATUM, 5, 6)
day = safe_sub(DATUM, 7, 8)
hour = safe_sub(TIME, 1, 2)
minute = safe_sub(TIME, 3, 4)
second = safe_sub(TIME, 5, 6)
local iso_date = string.format(
 '%s-%s-%sT%s:%s:%s.00000Z',
 year, month, day,
 hour, minute, second
)
return iso_date

local DATUM = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.DATUM
local TIME = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.TIME
local function safe_sub(str, start, finish)
 local s = string.sub(str, start, math.min(finish, #str))
 return s ~= "" and s or "00"
end
year = safe_sub(DATUM, 1, 4)
month = safe_sub(DATUM, 5, 6)
day = safe_sub(DATUM, 7, 8)
hour = safe_sub(TIME, 1, 2)
minute = safe_sub(TIME, 3, 4)
second = safe_sub(TIME, 5, 6)
local iso_date = string.format(
 '%s-%s-%sT%s:%s:%s.00000Z',
 year, month, day,
 hour, minute, second
)
return iso_date

local pkgs = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES
if type(pkgs) == "table" then
  for _, p in ipairs(pkgs) do
    if p.items then
      if type(p.items) ~= "table" then
        p.items = {p.items}
      else
        local isArr = true
        for k in pairs(p.items) do
          if type(k) ~= "number" then
            isArr = false
            break
          end
        end
        if not isArr then
          p.items = {p.items}
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
return pkgs

local pkgs = wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES
if type(pkgs) == "table" then
  for _, p in ipairs(pkgs) do
    if p.items then
      if type(p.items) ~= "table" then
        p.items = {p.items}
      else
        local isArr = true
        for k in pairs(p.items) do
          if type(k) ~= "number" then
            isArr = false
            break
          end
        end
        if not isArr then
          p.items = {p.items}
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
return pkgs

local result = _utils.array.new()
local items = wf.vars.parsedCsv
for _, item in ipairs(items) do
  if (item.Discount ~= "" and item.Discount ~= nil) or (item.Markdown ~= "" and item.Markdown ~= nil) then
    table.insert(result, item)
  end
end
return result
